reasoning: Google's 'Year in Search' highlights 'Trending' queries, which require a substantial spike in traffic in 2025 compared to 2024. Joe Biden had extraordinarily high search volume in 2024 due to the US presidential election and his decision to drop out of the race. Following his departure from office in January 2025, his search volume has almost certainly dropped drastically, making it statistically very difficult—if not impossible—for him to qualify as 'trending.' Even if he did, landing precisely at the #2 spot is highly improbable. The Polymarket price on October 30, 2025, heavily reflects this virtually zero percent chance (pricing it at 1%). Consequently, I estimate the likelihood at the minimum allowed bound.
